title: Songs My Mother Sold
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A jukebox repairman in coastal Kerala realizes every broken jukebox he fixes plays songs not from its records but from the suppressed memories of whoever is near it.
long_description: A jukebox repairman in coastal Kerala realizes every broken jukebox he fixes plays songs not from its records but from the suppressed memories of whoever is near it.
